arabic:
وعنها رضي الله عنها عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏من مات وعليه صوم، صام عنه وليه‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) said:
english.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "If a person dies without observing Saum (fasts), his Wali should make it up on his behalf.".

chapter.english: The Book of Miscellaneous ahadith of Significant Values
